name: python3-defusedcsv
title: python3-defusedcsv
summary: library that tries to mitigate CSV injection attacks (Python 3)
description:
library that tries to mitigate CSV injection attacks (Python 3)
This package contains a drop-in replacement for Python's CSV library that
tries to mitigate CSV injection attacks.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-defusedcsv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
